gui.tips.list.title: Tips List
tip.tipsmod.animal_growing.text: Feeding baby animals will make them grow up faster.
tip.tipsmod.arthropods.text: The bane of arthropods enchantment also increases damage against silverfish, endermites, and bees.
tip.tipsmod.axolotl_food.text: Axolotls like to eat tropical fish.
tip.tipsmod.azalea_caves.text: Azalea trees grow above the lush cave biomes.
tip.tipsmod.baby_panda_slimeball.text: Baby Pandas have a very rare chance to drop a slimeball after they sneeze.
tip.tipsmod.barrel.text: Barrels are a convenient alternative to chests.
tip.tipsmod.bed_explode.text: Trying to sleep in other dimensions will end poorly.
tip.tipsmod.bed_respawn.text: Sleeping in a bed will set your spawn point.
tip.tipsmod.biome_bonemeal.text: Using bone meal on grass blocks can give different types of flowers.
tip.tipsmod.biome_fishing.text: Fishing in a Jungle can give you different items compared to fishing in other biomes.
tip.tipsmod.blaze_fuel.text: Blaze rods are good fuel for furnaces.
tip.tipsmod.blaze_snowball.text: Blazes take damage when hit by snowballs.
tip.tipsmod.bucket_friends.text: Fish and axolotls can be safely picked up using buckets.
tip.tipsmod.bucket_rename.text: Renaming a bucket with a mob inside will rename that mob as well.
tip.tipsmod.coarse_to_dirt.text: Coarse dirt can be converted into normal dirt using a hoe.
tip.tipsmod.compass_spawn.text: Compasses point to the spawn point of your world.
tip.tipsmod.cooked_drops.text: Animals killed by fire damage usually drop cooked food.
tip.tipsmod.creeper_cat.text: Creepers are afraid of cats and will run away from them.
tip.tipsmod.creeper_drops_disc.text: Creepers will drop a music disc when killed by a skeletons arrow.
tip.tipsmod.crouch_blocks.text: Crouching will prevent you from falling off the side of blocks.
tip.tipsmod.deflect_ghast_fireballs.text: You can deflect ghast fireballs by attacking them.
tip.tipsmod.dog_health.text: The lower a dog's tail, the less health they have left.
tip.tipsmod.dog_rotten_flesh.text: You can heal wolves by feeding them rotten flesh.
tip.tipsmod.dripstone_lava.text: Pointed dripstone below lava will slowly drip lava particles. This can be used to fill a cauldron.
tip.tipsmod.elytra_boost.text: Using fireworks while flying with an elytra can boost your speed!
tip.tipsmod.end_dimension.text: You cannot leave the end dimension without defeating the ender dragon.. or dying.
tip.tipsmod.enderman_blocks.text: Enderman can move blocks like dirt, sand, and TNT!
tip.tipsmod.enderman_projectiles.text: Endermen can not be hit by projectiles.
tip.tipsmod.enderman_pumpkin.text: Wearing a carved pumpkin lowers the risk of enderman noticing you.
tip.tipsmod.enderman_stare.text: Enderman become hostile if you stare them in the eyes.
tip.tipsmod.endermites.text: Endermites may spawn when an enderman teleports or an enderpearl is used.
tip.tipsmod.fall_damage_blocks.text: Some blocks like water and hay can reduce fall damage.
tip.tipsmod.fortress_triangulation.text: You can triangulate stronghold locations by summoning eyes of ender from two different locations and tracking where their paths intersect.
tip.tipsmod.fossils.text: Large fossils can be found under swamps and deserts.
tip.tipsmod.four_eggs.text: Hatching chicken eggs may spawn four chickens on very rare occasions.
tip.tipsmod.freezing_leather.text: Leather armor can protect against freezing damage.
tip.tipsmod.goat_milk.text: Goats can be milked using a bucket.
tip.tipsmod.gravity_torch.text: Falling blocks like sand and gravel instantly break when falling onto a torch.
tip.tipsmod.iron_golem_heal.text: Iron golems can be healed by giving them iron ingots.
tip.tipsmod.job_site_dimension.text: Villagers lose their job site when changing dimensions.
tip.tipsmod.lava_fuel.text: Lava buckets can be used as fuel in the furnace.
tip.tipsmod.locked_repeaters.text: Repeaters can be locked and kept in its state by powering the sides of it with another repeater.
tip.tipsmod.lure_animals.text: Animals may follow you if you hold a food they like.
tip.tipsmod.mean_goats.text: Be careful around goats. They like to push players and other animals off cliffs.
tip.tipsmod.mooshroom_lightning.text: Red mooshrooms become brown, and brown mooshrooms become red, when struck by lightning.
tip.tipsmod.mushroom_biome_spawns.text: Hostile mobs do not spawn on mushroom islands.
tip.tipsmod.mushroom_placement.text: Mushrooms can not grow in direct sunlight.
tip.tipsmod.nether_lava.text: Lava spreads out faster in the nether.
tip.tipsmod.nether_sponge.text: Wet sponges will immediately dry when placed in the nether.
tip.tipsmod.nether_travel.text: Traveling one block in the nether is equivalent to traveling eight blocks in the overworld.
tip.tipsmod.note_block_instrument.text: The sound a note block makes will change based on the block beneath it.
tip.tipsmod.obsidian_formation.text: Obsidian is formed when water hits a lava source block.
tip.tipsmod.ore_tiers.text: Some ores have a minimum required pickaxe tier to mine them.
tip.tipsmod.peaceful_tnt.text: TNT cannot damage players in peaceful mode.
tip.tipsmod.piglin_repellent.text: Piglins are scared of soul fire blocks including the soul torch and soul lantern.
tip.tipsmod.poison_immune.text: Zombies, skeletons, and spiders are all immune to poison damage.
tip.tipsmod.portal_trick.text: By using water and lava buckets you can make an easy nether portal.
tip.tipsmod.scrap_nuggets.text: Old gold and iron equipment can be smelted into nuggets.
tip.tipsmod.shear_mooshroom.text: You can shear a mooshroom to turn it into a normal cow.
tip.tipsmod.sheared_cave_vines.text: You can shear the ends of cave vines to stop them from growing.
tip.tipsmod.shears_dispenser.text: You can put shears in a dispenser to shear sheep.
tip.tipsmod.shulker_armor.text: Shulkers take significantly less damage when their shells are closed.
tip.tipsmod.smoke_bees.text: Bees can be pacified by placing a campfire beneath their hive.
tip.tipsmod.snow_golem_trail.text: You can harvest infinite snowballs from a snow golems trail.
tip.tipsmod.spider_jockey.text: On rare occasions skeletons may ride spiders into combat!
tip.tipsmod.sponge_bucket.text: Wet sponge can be dried in a furnace by cooking it. If there is an empty bucket in the fuel slot the bucket will catch the water!
tip.tipsmod.string_wool.text: String can be crafted into wool.
tip.tipsmod.swamp_slime.text: Slimes can spawn in swamps during a full moon.
tip.tipsmod.turtle_shell.text: Turtles only drop scutes when a baby grows into an adult.
tip.tipsmod.undead_damage.text: Undead mobs are damaged by health potions and healed by damage potions.
tip.tipsmod.undead_helmet.text: Undead mobs will not burn in daylight if they are wearing a helmet.
tip.tipsmod.wandering_invis.text: Wandering traders drink invisibility potions at night.
tip.tipsmod.water_grass.text: Water can quickly break grass patches and get seeds.
tip.tipsmod.wax_copper.text: Honeycombs can be used to wax copper blocks. This prevents them from oxidizing.
tip.tipsmod.weather_sleep.text: Sleeping will clear up the sky and stop storm or rain.
tip.tipsmod.west.text: The Sun, moon, and stars all move towards the west.
tip.tipsmod.witch_conversion.text: Villagers transform into witches when struck by lightning.
tip.tipsmod.wooden_tool_fuel.text: Old wooden tools can be used as fuel in the furnace.
tip.tipsmod.zombie_armor.text: Zombies take slightly less damage than most mobs.
tipsmod.tip.animal_growing: Feeding baby animals will make them grow up sooner.
tipsmod.tip.arthropods: Spiders, Silverfish, Bees, and Endermites all take damage from Bane of Arthropods.
tipsmod.tip.axolotl_food: Axolotls like to eat tropical fish.
tipsmod.tip.azalea_caves: Azalea trees grow above the lush cave biomes.
tipsmod.tip.baby_panda_slimeball: Baby Pandas have a 0.1% chance to drop a slimeball after they sneeze.
tipsmod.tip.barrel: Barrels are a convenient alternative to chests.
tipsmod.tip.bed_explode: Trying to sleep in other dimensions will end poorly.
tipsmod.tip.bed_respawn: Sleeping in a bed will set your spawn point.
tipsmod.tip.biome_bonemeal: Using bone meal on grass blocks can give different types of flowers.
tipsmod.tip.biome_fishing: Fishing in a Jungle can give you different items compared to fishing in other biomes.
tipsmod.tip.blaze_fuel: Blaze rods are good fuel for furnaces.
tipsmod.tip.boat_jump: By placing a boat in lava you can make a temporary platform.
tipsmod.tip.bucket_friends: Fish and Axolotls can be safely picked up using buckets.
tipsmod.tip.bucket_rename: Renaming a bucket with a mob inside will rename that mob as well.
tipsmod.tip.coarse_to_dirt: Coarse Dirt can be converted into normal dirt using a hoe.
tipsmod.tip.cooked_drops: Animals killed by fire damage usually drop cooked food.
tipsmod.tip.creeper_cat: Creepers are afraid of cats and will run away from them.
tipsmod.tip.creeper_drops_disc: If a Skeleton's or Stray's arrow kills a Creeper, the Creeper drops a random music disc.
tipsmod.tip.crouch_blocks: Sneaking/Crouching will prevent you from falling off the side of blocks.
tipsmod.tip.deflect_ghast_fireballs: You can deflect Ghast Fireballs by attacking them.
tipsmod.tip.dog_health: The lower a dog's tail, the less health they have left.
tipsmod.tip.dog_rotten_flesh: You can heal your dogs by feeding them Rotten Flesh.
tipsmod.tip.dragon_blocks: Iron Bars, End Stone, and Obsidian are immune to damage from the Ender Dragon.
tipsmod.tip.dripstone_lava: Pointed dripstone below lava will slowly drip lava particles. This can be used to fill a cauldron.
tipsmod.tip.end_dimension: You cannot leave the end dimension without defeating the ender dragon.. or dying.
tipsmod.tip.enderman_blocks: Enderman can move blocks like dirt, sand, and TNT!
tipsmod.tip.enderman_projectiles: Endermen can not be hit by projectiles.
tipsmod.tip.endermites: There is a small chance that an Endermite will spawn when an Enderpearl lands.
tipsmod.tip.fall_damage_blocks: Some blocks like water and hay can reduce fall damage.
tipsmod.tip.fishing_resources: Fishing is a great way to get high level enchanted books.
tipsmod.tip.fortress_triangulation: You can triangulate stronghold locations by summoning eyes of ender from two different locations and tracking where they intersect.
tipsmod.tip.fossils: Large fossils are buried under swamps and deserts.
tipsmod.tip.four_eggs: Hatching chicken eggs can spawn four chickens on very rare occasions.
tipsmod.tip.freezing_leather: Leather armor can protect against freezing damage.
tipsmod.tip.goat_milk: Goats can be milked using a bucket.
tipsmod.tip.gravity_torch: Falling blocks like sand and gravel instantly break when falling onto a torch.
tipsmod.tip.hitting_obsidian: It takes roughly 4 minutes to break an obsidian block by hand.
tipsmod.tip.iron_golem_heal: Iron Golems can be healed by giving them iron ingots.
tipsmod.tip.job_site_dimension: Villagers lose their job site when changing dimensions.
tipsmod.tip.joke.combat: Zombies dislike it when you stab them with a sword.
tipsmod.tip.joke.lava: Like any items, buckets will burn in lava, but not when it is IN the bucket.
tipsmod.tip.joke.skulls: Wither Skeletons are known to lose their heads.
tipsmod.tip.joke.swim: If you stay under water too long you may drown.
tipsmod.tip.lava_fuel: Lava Buckets can be used as fuel in the Furnace.
tipsmod.tip.locked_repeaters: Repeaters can be locked and kept in its state by powering the sides of it with another repeater.
tipsmod.tip.lure_animals: You can lure animals into following you by holding a food they like.
tipsmod.tip.mean_goats: Be careful around goats. They like to push players and other animals off cliffs.
tipsmod.tip.mooshroom_lightning: A red mooshroom will become a brown mooshroom, and a brown mooshroom will become a red one, when struck by lightning.
tipsmod.tip.mushroom_biome_spawns: Hostile mobs cannot spawn in a mushroom biome.
tipsmod.tip.mushroom_placement: Mushrooms can only be placed on blocks where there's no direct sunlight.
tipsmod.tip.nether_lava: Lava will spread faster in the nether.
tipsmod.tip.nether_sponge: Wet sponges will immediately dry when placed in the nether.
tipsmod.tip.no_tips: No tips have been loaded. Please review the configurations.
tipsmod.tip.note_block_instrument: The instrument of a Note Block is determined by the block underneath it.
tipsmod.tip.ore_tiers: Some ores have a minimum required pickaxe tier to mine them.
tipsmod.tip.peaceful_tnt: TNT cannot damage players in peaceful mode.
tipsmod.tip.piglin_repellent: Piglins are scared of soul fire blocks including the Soul Torch and Soul Lantern.
tipsmod.tip.poison_immune: Zombies, Skeletons, and Spiders are all immune to poison damage.
tipsmod.tip.portal_trick: By using water and lava buckets you can make an easy nether portal.
tipsmod.tip.scrap_nuggets: Gold and Iron tools/armor can be smelted into nuggets.
tipsmod.tip.shear_mooshroom: You can shear a mooshroom to turn it into a normal cow.
tipsmod.tip.sheared_cave_vines: You can shear the ends of cave vines to stop them from growing.
tipsmod.tip.shears_dispenser: You can put shears in a dispenser to shear sheep.
tipsmod.tip.shulker_armor: Shulkers take significantly more damage when their shells are open.
tipsmod.tip.shulker_golem: Shulkers are considered a type of Golem.
tipsmod.tip.sitting_pets: Sitting pets will remain seated when sinking in water until they drown or you right-click them.
tipsmod.tip.smoke_bees: Placing a Campfire beneath a Bee Nest will make those Bees passive.
tipsmod.tip.snow_golem_trail: You can harvest infinite snowballs from a snow golem's trail.
tipsmod.tip.sponge_bucket: Wet Sponge can be dried in a furnace by cooking it. If there is an empty bucket in the fuel slot the bucket will catch the water!
tipsmod.tip.string_wool: String can be crafted in a 2x2 to make wool.
tipsmod.tip.swamp_slime: Slimes can spawn in swamps during a full moon.
tipsmod.tip.turtle_shell: Turtles only drop scutes when a baby grows into an adult.
tipsmod.tip.undead_damage: Undead mobs like Skeletons are damaged by health potions and healed by damage potions.
tipsmod.tip.undead_helmet: Undead mobs will not burn in daylight if they are wearing a helmet.
tipsmod.tip.villager_sweat: Villagers sweat when trying to trade with them during a raid.
tipsmod.tip.wandering_invis: Wandering traders drink invisibility potions at night.
tipsmod.tip.water_doors: You can place a door underwater to create an air pocket.
tipsmod.tip.water_grass: Water can quickly break grass patches and get seeds.
tipsmod.tip.wax_copper: Honeycombs can be used to wax copper blocks. This prevents them from oxidizing.
tipsmod.tip.weather_sleep: Sleeping will clear up the sky and stop storm or rain.
tipsmod.tip.west: The Sun, Moon, and Stars all move towards the west.
tipsmod.tip.witch_conversion: Villagers will become witches when struck by lightning.
tipsmod.tip.wooden_tool_fuel: Old Wooden tools can be used as fuel in the Furnace.
tipsmod.tip.zombie_armor: Zombies have two base points of armor, even when they are not wearing any.
